statements.impact_statement: False positive. nox's AI-AGENT-001 rule pattern-matches on tool names containing 'execute' and classifies query_execute as 'shell_exec'. scry's query_execute runs GraphQL queries via HTTP POST through the upstream.Client (a fortify-wrapped http.Client) — it does not invoke a shell, does not call os/exec, and does not interpret the query string. Static check: `grep -n 'shell_exec|exec.Command|os/exec' internal/server/query_tools.go` returns no matches. The tool is validated against the cached schema, cost-gated, and budget-gated before any upstream call. CWE-77 (Command Injection) does not apply to a JSON-RPC GraphQL forwarder.

_governance.fingerprint_note: Refreshed for nox 1.7.1 (v2 line-independent fingerprint from full-repo `nox scan .`); prior nox 0.9.5 fingerprint 6e6305015be7 no longer emitted.
